title: FloydCraft
description: 1.19.2 Vanillia+ Fabric Adventure modpack. Named after the titular legendary boxer Floyd "Money" Mayweather!
body:
# Welcome to FloydCraft!
Modelled after Floyd Mayweather, I wanted to start a small SMP in his honor and this seems the easiest method of the mod's distrobution. Using Fabric API and Minecraft 1.19.2. My recommended modloader is fabric, and my recommended launcher is ATLauncher. https://atlauncher.com/downloads

### AIMS OF FLOYDCRAFT!
- To have an enjoyable minecraft experience that enchances Vanilla minecraft
- To be able to host this modpack on a server and have it run with multiple other participants
- To be able to run on everyone's computer


# Supported Modloaders
### Fabric (Recommended)
Fabric is the modloader of choice for FloydCraft. If unsure on what modloader to use, then Fabric is the best choice for running FloydCraft. With Fabric, FloydCraft can be ran right out of the box with what's included in the download. https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/




### Forge (Not Supported)
We have no plans to ever support the Forge modloader.

Fabric mods have an entirely different architecture than Forge mods and cannot easily be ported.
Even if Fabric mods worked in Forge, we would not officially support Forge as we believe it is both a technologically and ideologically inferior software than Fabric.

# FloydCraft wouldn't be possible WITHOUT
- Macaw's Bridges (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-bridges)
- Macaw's Doors (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors)
- Naturalist (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naturalist)
- Macaw's Paintings (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-paintings)
- Macaw's Windows (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows)
- Structory (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory)
- More Villagers [Fabric] (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers-fabric)
- Another Furniture (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/another-furniture)
